  -------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  Index  Name              CIR(kbps)   PIR(kbps)   Priority  Priority-policy
  -------------------------------------------------------------------------------
  6      DOTMAC_100M_IN    50000       100000      0         local-pri
  7      DOTMAC_100M_OUT   50000       100000      0         local-pri
  20     DOTMAC_250M_IN    125000      250000      3         local-pri
  -------------------------------------------------------------------------------
